review.title: Clip candidate queue
review.description: Mock signals help an editor judge what happened, why it was detected, how chat reacted, and whether it deserves manual editing.
review.searchPlaceholder: Search title, streamer, reason, notes, or chat phrase
review.ffmpegDev: FFmpeg clip generation is development-only and local-media based.
review.noMatchesHelp: Try lowering confidence, clearing search, or selecting all statuses.
review.lastImport: Last import generated {candidates} candidates from {messages} messages. Peak chat velocity was {peak}/min.

chatImport.title: Generate candidates from chat activity
chatImport.description: Paste or load a simple chat JSON array. The rule-based analyzer groups messages into time windows, detects activity spikes and reaction keywords, then creates review candidates.
chatImport.adapterNote: Optional adapter. Requires `chat_downloader` on the server PATH. Manual JSON import remains available below.
chatImport.clientNote: Manual JSON runs client-side. chat-downloader stores normalized JSON under MEDIA_ROOT.
chatImport.rules2: Highlights are detected from volume spikes, unique chatters, repeated phrases, and reaction keywords.
chatImport.rules3: Supported reaction hints include laughter, surprise, praise, and clip requests.
chatImport.chatOnlyWarning: This is chat-only analysis. Confirm the source archive manually.

media.title: Register a local video and generate FFmpeg clips
media.description: Development-safe media access uses MEDIA_ROOT only. Put source files under media/input, or download from URL, probe with FFprobe, then generate clips from candidate variants.
media.urlImportDescription: Optional video source adapter. Downloads an archive URL into `media/input/downloads/`, then registers it as the current local input path.
media.streamCopyNote: Stream copy is fast but may cut only on keyframes. Use re-encode mode for more accurate development clips.

posting.thumbnailTextNote: Use these as manual text overlays, not final generated thumbnails.
posting.thumbnailTimestampsNote: Generate still frames from the clean clip when available.
posting.copyFailed: Copy failed. Select the text manually.

archive.title: Auto-analysis pipeline from archive URL
archive.description: Downloads video with yt-dlp, fetches chat with chat-downloader, runs rule analysis, generates FFmpeg clips, transcribes with faster-whisper, exports comment JSON/ASS, and creates editor packages.
archive.invalidUrl: URL must start with http:// or https://.
archive.howMetadata: 1. yt-dlp fetches video metadata and downloads the archive to `media/input/downloads/`.
archive.howChat: 2. chat-downloader fetches chat messages; rule-based analysis generates candidates.
archive.howClips: 3. Top candidates are clipped with FFmpeg and transcribed with faster-whisper.
archive.howComments: 4. NicoNico-style comment JSON/ASS files are exported, then editor packages are generated.
